sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1550" key="a)dwsidiki/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδωσι-δικία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n1550.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">failure to give satisfaction, P Lond.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0011.tlg003.perseus-grc1:2:357:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.357.7</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0011.tlg003.perseus-grc1:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope> </bibl> B.C.).</sense> </entryFree>
